sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106873" key="u(panakaqai/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπανα-κᾰθαίρω</orth>, <sense id="n106873.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">purge gently,</tr_> cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἢ ἀνακ</foreign>- in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.86</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
